name: Japan Industrial Production (METI Indices of Industrial Production)
notes: T2 fallback for FRED JPNPROINDMISMEI (frozen 2024-03). All aggregator paths (FRED/OECD/IMF) frozen at 2023-11 — upstream OECD MEI freeze. e-Stat statsDataId 0003446463 is METI's IIP table. Wired §3.1 Stage D.4 2026-04-30. If the table has multiple slices we'll add cdCatNN filter in a follow-up.

name: Japan Machinery Orders (Cabinet Office Orders Received for Machinery — private sector ex volatile)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. Cabinet Office Machinery Orders Statistics — 機械受注統計調査 主要長期時系列統計表 (private sector ex ships and electric power; the SA monthly long time-series). e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00100401, tstat 000001017809, statsDataId 0003355224 (replaces the wrong 0003193087 that errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?cycle=8&toukei=00100401&tstat=000001017809&statdisp_id=0003355224. Still needs cdCatNN filter to pin the private-ex-volatile SA slice; revisit on first credentialed fetch with the new ID.

name: Japan Retail Sales Total (METI Current Survey of Commerce — Commercial Sales)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. METI Current Survey of Commerce (商業動態統計) — 第5部指数 業種別商業販売額指数, SA monthly. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00550030, statsDataId 0003138782 (replaces the wrong 0003285601 that errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?stat_infid=000031390838&layout=dataset&statdisp_id=0003138782. Retail (小売業) is selectable via cdCat; revisit on first credentialed fetch. 2026-06-11 follow-up note: a second discovery pass flagged the possibility that 0003138782 is the 平成25年（2013）年報 archive rather than the live monthly headline — the METI live headline may live in stat-search/files (stat_infid=000040274818) only, not the DB API. Verify on first credentialed CI run by checking last_obs: if 2013-ish, switch to file-download; if 2026-ish, keep as is.

name: Japan Household Real Expenditure (MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey — two-or-more-person households)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey (家計調査) — 用途分類 001 用途分類（総数）全国, monthly two-or-more-person households. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00200561, statsDataId 0003000807 (replaces the wrong 0002070010 that errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?layout=dataset&statdisp_id=0003000807. Real consumption + YoY columns selectable via cdCat; revisit on first credentialed fetch. Alt candidate 0003343671 (品目分類 010, newer) if 用途分類 doesn't expose real YoY.

name: Japan Economy Watchers Survey — Current Conditions DI (Cabinet Office)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. Cabinet Office Economy Watchers Survey (景気ウォッチャー調査) — 季節調整値 全国の分野・業種別DIの推移. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00100001, tstat 000001012172, statsDataId 0003348423 (2026-06-11 follow-up: replaces the first-agent suggestion 0003348424 which is the regional breakdown, not the national headline). To extract the national current-DI direction: cdCat filters 分野=合計 + 景気の方向性及び水準=景気の現状判断（方向性）. Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?cycle=1&toukei=00100001&tstat=000001012172&statdisp_id=0003348423. Original PROVISIONAL was 0003065691 (errored "does not exist" 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC).
